case_title: MICHAEL A. KELLEY JR VS. YOLANDA JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KELLEY JR, MICHAEL A. JOHNSON, YOLANDA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLEY JR, MICHAEL A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KELLEY JR, MICHAEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, YOLANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED FEB-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, YOLANDA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ANGELS KELLY JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOLANDA JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED A JUDGMENT IN CASE 855973 FOR THE SAME ALLEGATIONS AGAINST EMPLOYER AND IS THEREFORE NOT ALLOWED TO BRING THE SAME SUIT AGAINST EMPLOYEES (RES JUDICATA). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
